scope: Initial NearMe extension scaffold — Special:Nearby, action=cargonearby, Cargo NEAR queries, MW 1.39 frontend
summary_for_grok: Pass 1 review of the initial NearMe scaffold (commit 7538685). Found 4 bugs: (B1) implicit nullable PHP 8.1 deprecation in ApiCargoNearby constructor; (B2) dieWithError passes table name as API $data instead of i18n param so '$1' is never substituted in the unknown-table error message; (B3) JS reads mw.config with 'wgNearMeDefaultRadius'/'wgNearMeDefaultLimit' keys (wrong prefix) so admin-configured radius/limit is always ignored; (B4) non-numeric gscoord parts silently cast to 0.0 bypassing validation. 5 suggestions: narrow exception catch in queryAll, deprecated wfLogWarning, mw.Title can throw in toCard, showButtonDisabled never reset, unverified router exit callback. 3 nits: dead nearme-error-guidance message, README PHP version wrong, missing explicit jquery dependency.
